candidate_definition_hints.text: ELECTRA: Pre-training Text Encoders as Discriminators Rather Than Generators

**ELECTRA** is a method for self-supervised language representation learning. It can be used to pre-train transformer networks using relatively little compute. ELECTRA models are trained to distinguish "real" input tokens vs "fake" input tokens generated by another neural networ…
